title: Object Selection Dropdown Pointing to Legacy PHP Route
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the object selection dropdown to navigate to the correct URL route, so that I land on the proper page instead of a legacy PHP file.
description:
The object selection dropdown was routing users to an older PHP file (`migrate.php?object=Opportunity`) instead of the updated route (`select/?object=Opportunity&view=`). This caused navigation errors and potentially broken page renders.

The fix updated the dropdown link targets to point to the new URL structure.
acceptance_criteria: Object selection dropdown navigates to `select/?object={ObjectName}&view=` instead of `migrate.php?object={ObjectName}`
Navigation renders correctly after selecting an object from the dropdown
No debug output or meta fields are printed on the page
ux_changes: Object selection dropdown links updated from legacy `migrate.php` route to the new `select/` route with proper URL parameters.
implementation_notes: Developer initially left debug output (meta fields) on the page during testing, which caused a secondary rendering issue. This was cleaned up in a follow-up fix.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the route and marked as done. Reporter found a rendering issue caused by leftover debug output on the page. Developer cleaned up the debug output promptly.
